'''鈭歱-p-dh-zh''' ('''kapapdhezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wuss|wuss]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-p-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wuss|wuss]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-p-dh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kapapdhezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipapdhezhoko|thipapdhezhoko]] || [[word:jipapdhezhoko|jipapdhezhoko]] || [[word:shipapdhezhoko|shipapdhezhoko]] || [[word:kipapdhezhoko|kipapdhezhoko]]

|-
